products.title: Our Fears Made Manifest
products.description: A collection examining terror, trauma, and loss in film from 1998 to 2019.
products.longDescription: An academic collection rooted in horror, film, and popular culture studies — reflecting my ongoing engagement with criticism and scholarship.

products.title: Uncovering Stranger Things
products.description: Critical work engaging with nostalgia, innocence, and horror in the Stranger Things universe.
products.longDescription: A scholarly publication that reflects my interest in horror, popular culture, and how cultural stories shape identity and memory.

products.title: Theories and Strategies for Teaching Creative Writing Online
products.description: A pedagogy-focused resource for teaching creative writing in digital learning environments.
products.longDescription: A teaching-centered publication that draws from my classroom experience and commitment to creative writing instruction across formats.

products.title: Poop-tastic Coloring Adventures
products.description: A playful coloring book — a lighter, more whimsical side of what I make.
products.longDescription: A creative, kid-facing project that expands my work beyond academic writing and into something more accessible and fun.

products.title: World of Whiskers
products.description: A lighter creative project that sits alongside my academic and instructional work.
products.longDescription: A lighter creative project alongside my academic writing, showing a broader range of what I'm interested in and what I make.

products.title: The Crazy English Lady
products.description: My Teachers Pay Teachers storefront — classroom-ready resources and writing support materials.
products.longDescription: A growing teaching-resource collection designed to support writing instruction, classroom engagement, and creative learning.
